taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, General Software Engineer
must_have_quals: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, or related technical discipline with proven experience coding in languages including, but not limited to, C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript, or Python, OR equivalent experience, Ability to meet Microsoft, customer and/or government security screening requirements are required for this role
preferred_quals: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science or related technical field AND 1+ year(s) technical engineering experience with coding in languages including, but not limited to, C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript, or Python, OR Master's Degree in Computer Science or related technical field with proven experience coding in languages including, but not limited to, C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript, or Python, OR equivalent experience, 1+ years of experience with front-end development in an industry setting, 1+ years of experience with front-end frameworks such as React, Angular, or equivalent, Proven experience with backend development, preferably using ASP.NET Core/C# or other modern server-side technologies, Demonstrates ability to ship high-quality software on time, Applies problem-solving skills and works effectively in a collaborative team environment, Shows passion for customers, design thinking, data analysis, and technology, Performs at a high level in a fast-paced, dynamic environment
core_responsibilities: Designs secure, reliable, scalable, and sustainable software, Develops, validates, releases, and derives insights from software that enhances customer experiences, Champions customer-first design to increase loyalty to Copilot and Microsoft 365, Applies critical analysis to data to validate hypotheses and inform decisions, Fosters an inclusive environment that welcomes perspectives and leverages them to create more inclusive products for customers, Models a growth mindset by learning from others and sharing learnings, Embodies Microsoft’s culture and values
job_summary: Microsoft is seeking a Software Engineer to join their Experience + Devices Growth team, which focuses on enhancing the adoption of Copilot and Microsoft 365. The role involves implementing and testing features, collaborating with various stakeholders to derive customer insights, and fostering an inclusive workplace culture.
